description: Maps layer-name tokens to smart-group tags for the mapping editor's Target-side node filters. This file is user-editable -- add, rename, or retune categories/tokens/thresholds for your own firm's layer standard. See docs/history or memory.md for the design rationale. A category marked "exclusive": true is evaluated first; any layer it matches is blocked from all other CONTENT tags (Floor Plan/Wall/Door/etc.) but still receives its discipline tag -- used for Annotative, so annotation never counts as plan content when filtering, while 'Architectural on' still shows A-ANNO layers. sortGroup (Discipline | General | Specific, default Specific) controls each toggle's tier: ordering/color in the panel, and how it covers layers (Discipline/General by plain tag membership, Specific via each layer's single most-specific tag).

categories.name: Interior Design
categories.description: Interior design discipline (a full consultant designator, distinct from Architectural's own interior-facing sheet content)

categories.name: Annotative
categories.description: Dimensions, tags, text, revision clouds, symbols. Exclusive: matched layers get ONLY this tag, never Floor Plan/Wall/Door/etc. too.

categories.name: Life Safety
categories.description: Egress/life-safety annotation, including area-of-refuge notation (ARA). Exempt from folding: Annotative claims most LIFESAFETY layers first (it's exclusive), so real counts here are often low, but this stays visible whenever it has any match at all rather than silently disappearing.

categories.name: Coordination Notes
categories.description: Cross-discipline coordination scratch notes (kept as one flat tag regardless of which discipline suffix follows)

categories.name: Hatches/Patterns/Fills
categories.description: Hatch/pattern/fill content -- shows up across Details, Floor Plan, and Site Plan alike

categories.name: MEP
categories.description: MEP content drawn on architectural floor plans, including plumbing fixtures (FIXTURE/FIXTURES/PLUMBING_FIXTURE/PFIXT are plumbing-fixture abbreviations, folded in here rather than a separate category)

categories.name: Wall
categories.description: Wall content, matched anywhere in the layer name regardless of discipline/sheet type

categories.name: Door
categories.description: Door content, matched anywhere in the layer name

categories.name: Window
categories.description: Window/glazing content, matched anywhere in the layer name
